assumptions.fee_source: Bybit futures example taker fee 0.055%; applied on notional turnover.
assumptions.funding: Bybit MNTUSDT daily average funding * 3 funding windows/day.
assumptions.yield: TVL-weighted Mantle stable pool APY from DeFiLlama Yields; missing early history is filled with the first observed Mantle stable APY as a stable-yield proxy.
assumptions.warmup: Replay starts on 2024-06-01; earlier data is warmup for rolling signal health.
assumptions.leverage: Leverage slider scales long exposure only; risk-off or neutral signals allocate to stable yield. Liquidation uses next-day low approximation and ignores exchange maintenance tiers.
